title: Axo's Double Slabs
description: 60+ new blocks all available in complete vanilla
body:
Finally released for java, and with a whole load of updates to the textures, including support for new 1.21.4 blocks and animated blocks!

This is just a texture pack, no datapacks or mods required, all you have to do is place 2 slabs on top of eachother and you'll get access to all these new blocks in complete vanilla :D


<details>
<summary>Full list of all the blocks and what slab is needed in case you cant find the one you want:</summary>

- Oak - Beehive Top                            
- Spruce - Fish Barrel                   
- Birch - Antique Globe                   
- Jungle - Mossy Log                    
- Acacia - Tropical Fish Plush                
- Dark Oak - Wall Trim / Table                
- Mangrove - Root Planks                  
- Cherry - Cherry Bookshelf                 
- Pale Oak - Grey Planks                  
- Bamboo - Crate                      
- Bamboo Mosaic - Drawers                
- Crimson - Smithing Table Planks              
- Warped - Globe                     
- Stone - Villager Totem                  
- Cobblestone - Stone Pillar                 
- Mossy Cobble - Mossy Top Stone              
- Smooth Stone - Stone Trim                
- Stone Bricks - Vertical Bricks               
- Mossy Stone Bricks - Plant Pot              
- Granite - Brick Trim                    
- Polished Granite - Polished Dripstone            
- Diorite - Marble                      
- Polished Diorite - FNAF Tiles                
- Andesite - Water Bucket (RELEASE!)              
- Polished Andesite - Andesite Trim              
- Cobble Deepslate - Grimstone                
- Polished Deepslate - Placeable Reinforced Deepslate
- Deepslate Bricks - Mossy Deepslate Bricks
- Deepslate Tiles - Mossy Deepslate Tiles
- Tuff - Tuff Crystal
- Polished Tuff - Tuff Column
- Tuff Bricks - Tuff Brick Variant
- Brick - Tired Brick
- Mud Brick - Polished Mud
- Sandstone - Rocky Sandstone
- Smooth Sandstone - Temple Themed Sandstone
- Cut Sandstone - Sandstone Bricks
- Red Sandstone - Rocky Red Sandstone
- Smooth Red Sandstone - Lava Bucket
- Cut Red Sandstone - Red Sandstone Bricks
- Prismarine - Blue Prismarine
-  Prismarine Bricks - Fish Tank
- Dark Prismarine - Chiseled Dark Prismarine
- Resin Bricks - Placeable Active Creaking Heart
- ALL Copper - Respective Copper Golem
- Waxed Oxidised Copper - Copper Tiles
-  Blackstone - Blackstone Pedestal
- Polished Blackstone - Smithing Table Top
- Blackstone Brick - Ominous Jar
- Nether Brick - Fire Cage
- Red Nether Brick - Unpowered Redstone Block
- Quartz - Kitchen Tiles
- Smooth Quartz - Quartz Pillar End
- End Stone - End Pedestal
- Purpur - ERROR

</details>



All textures have been purposefully matched closely in theme or colour so builds dont look awful if the pack is removed :)

A bedrock version is available on PMC - [https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/axo-s-double-slabs-default-edition-be/](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/axo-s-double-slabs-default-edition-be/) - although it is a little outdated rn
